business.title: Saudi Aramco boss pulls out of major international energy conference due to Iran conflict, source says
business.description: Saudi Aramco CEO Amin Nasser has cancelled his appearance at the CERAWeek energy conference in Houston. He is staying in Saudi Arabia due to the ongoing Iran conflict. This decision highlights the serious challenges he faces. The conflict has disrupted global markets and targeted energy infrastructure. Other energy leaders are also altering their attendance plans.

business.title: Kotak Bank set to acquire Deutsche's retail business in Rs 4,500-crore deal
business.description: Kotak Mahindra Bank is poised to take a major leap by acquiring Deutsche Bank's retail operations in India for around Rs 4,500 crore. This deal promises to strengthen Kotak's retail lending capabilities and broaden its base of deposits. Meanwhile, Deutsche Bank's exit reflects a larger strategy to streamline its operations worldwide.

business.title: Iran war impact: OMCs plan smaller LPG cylinders to boost supply
business.description: Due to the impact of the war in Iran on LPG supplies, families could be receiving a reduced amount of 10 kg per standard 14.2 kg gas cylinder soon. This initiative is a preventative measure to optimize the dwindling resources, enabling more households to access LPG.

business.title: QBit Semiconductor Plans Taiwan IPO in 2026
business.description: TAIPEI, March 23, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- QBit Semiconductor LTD. ('QBit') announced that it has completed its Series B fundraising round with participation from an affiliate of Arm Holdings plc. Following this investment, QBit plans to apply for an initial public offering in Taiwan by the fourth quarter of 2026.

business.title: Discover the Future of Automotive Manufacturing Technology in AMTS 2026, Shanghai, China - Register Now for Free Pass
business.description: SHANGHAI, March 23, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- AMTS (Shanghai International Automotive Manufacturing Technology & Materials Show) is the leading one-stop platform showcasing the latest technologies and solutions in automotive engineering and manufacturing. Keeping up with the trend of new energy vehicles, the exhibition will focus on the innovative design and manufacturing processes of auto parts for new energy vehicles, and the newly designed TechShow Arena will gather cutting-edge automotive technology.

science.title: Measuring irreversibility in gene transcription
science.description: Living cells are fundamentally nonequilibrium systems, meaning they constantly spend energy through seemingly one-way, irreversible processes, such as transcribing DNA into RNA, to keep life going. But how that irreversibility appears in the dynamics of individual genes has been difficult to measure.

science.title: Fiber-optic sensors reveal how farming destroys soil's natural structure
science.description: Soil is often perceived simply as "dirt," but in reality, it is a dynamic, living system that acts as Earth's natural sponge. Unfortunately, common agricultural practices—including deep plowing and the use of heavy machinery—can severely disrupt this natural system, according to a new study led by Dr. Shi Qibin from the Institute of Geology and Geophysics of the Chinese Academy of Sciences, in collaboration with international partners.
